name: cache layer: corrupted cache file is detected, deleted, and rule re-runs (no crash)
command: echo 'NOT JSON' > .cache; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/f.js" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" --report-format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"cache_status":"miss"' out.json 1>&2 && grep -E '"cache_recovered":true' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
